final_draft: Stop manual busywork. Workflow Automation frees your team to focus on what actually matters—higher-value work. See it in action. #WorkflowAutomation #ProductivityGains

final_review.notes: Strong, concise draft that meets brand standards. The message directly mirrors the brief's key_message ("Workflow Automation clears manual busywork off your team's plate so people can focus on higher-value work"). Copy uses plain language, avoids all banned words, contains no exclamation points, and maintains a confident tone without hype or fear-based urgency. No security/compliance claims are made, so the trust disclaimer is not required. The hashtags are appropriate for social context and add to the energetic tone. Reading level is accessible.
